subcodes.first_line: O Son of Aaron! The Wronged One remembereth thee from the prison-precinct, and calleth thee unto God, the Protector, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن هارون یذکرک المظلوم من شطر السجن و یدعوک الی الله المهیمن القیوم ان
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
